rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no "fixed" retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match.
Rough-cut drafts for articles.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Article-drafting rule; this is a module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Training creator's name banned in student-facing body.
Author-"we" ban — first-person-plural extension.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 38: "reports 3–5 lines, student pushes back. If any rule is team-worthy (one every engineer on this codebase would benefit from) the agent calls it out in the summary so the student can open a PR"
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Recast both instances to second-person: "reports 3–5 lines, push back" and "you can open a PR" — or move the whole Debrief delivery-note to below the maintainer cut.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 51: "Find your way to do it over time. There is no rush."
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cut the reassurance closer; the structural description of use cases already carries the point. Peer voice doesn't apologise for optional pace.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verbatim-frame-cite in reference artefact.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule fires at article-drafting time; this is a module file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cap practitioner attribution at one student-side mention per module.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
Watch out for planting jargon too early.
Audit the closer when trimming a body-prose forcing function.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No forcing function was trimmed in this file; rule does not apply.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
Earn every technical term on first use.
Business-audience word ban (Bootstrap default).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Bootstrap SVP-marketing test is N/A; AE101 targets engineer ICs with different register contract.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Memory vs context — use deliberately.
Golden path only in the body.
Q1/Q2/Q3 retro interview is banned at every module.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
Inline links use the target's title, never its filename.
LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow.
Mood contract named.
Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
CTO-repeatable test.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Sales-copy rule; this is student-facing curriculum, not buyer-facing copy.
